parameters.name: organization_id
parameters.description: The ID of the organization that owns the resource.

parameters.name: resource_type_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the resource type.

parameters.name: external_id
parameters.description: An identifier you provide to reference the resource in your system.

parameters.name: cascade_delete
parameters.description: If true, deletes all descendant resources and role assignments. If not set and the resource has children or assignments, the request will fail.
